page_header.label: FEATURES
page_header.title: Confidential Payments, Six Ways
page_header.description: Every tool you need for private transactions on Solana.

items.label: FEATURE 01
items.title: Stealth Payments
items.description: One-time addresses for every payment. Your wallet address stays private while remaining publicly shareable.

items.label: FEATURE 02
items.title: Batch Payments
items.description: Pay multiple recipients in one flow. Upload a CSV or enter manually, each recipient gets their own claim link.

items.label: FEATURE 03
items.title: Conditional Escrow
items.description: Milestone-based payment releases. Funds unlock as conditions are met, perfect for freelance projects.

items.label: FEATURE 04
items.title: Multi-Sig
items.description: Multiple approvers for high-value transfers. Shared control with configurable M-of-N thresholds.

items.label: FEATURE 05
items.title: Payment Widget
items.description: Embeddable payments for any website. React components, iframe, or vanilla JS integration options.

items.label: FEATURE 06
items.title: Telegram Bot
items.description: Confidential payments from chat. Non-custodial bot generates secure payment links for easy sharing.

sections.title: Ready to start?
sections.description: Create your first confidential payment link and experience the future of private transactions on Solana.
